titleStmt.title: SII 26.744: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 744. (A.R. No. 693 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same shrine.
This inscription is damaged and incomplete.

It records a re-grant of land in Vaṅgāram alias Dēvarāyaṉ-ēri in Mīśaṅgilināḍu, previously granted by a certain Tirumalaichchāmantaṉār, by [•••] Irāgutta Miṇḍśā[. .] vikku Parivaḻaṅgiṉāṉ Kuṭṭiṉakaikku Āḻi-iṭṭāṉ Tiyāgavāchāriyaṉ Āvuḍaiyanayiṉār alias Pagāmaḍattich-chāmantaṉ of Vaḷambakuḍi to the temple of Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam-uḍaiya Tambirāṉār, also called Niḻalārśōlaivaṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār. It is stated that the gift was intended for food-offerings and the mahāpūjai, repairs and festivals in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīman śrīmatuvaḷampakuṭi Uṭaiyāṉ cāmantaraitta ṟku na Irākutta miṇṭacā
ku vikku parivaḻaṅkiṉāṉ kuṭṭiṉakaikku Āḻi Iṭṭāṉ tiyākavācāriyiṉ Āvuṭaiyanayiṉār Āṉa
pakāmaṭattic cāmantaṉār niḻalārcolaivaṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tiruneṭuṅkaḷamuṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku
kaliyuka caṅvaccarattu cakāttam 1000 4 100 2 10 5 mel cellāniṉṟa Utiroṟkāri varuṣa tai mātam 1 nāḷ
caṅkirama puṇṇiyakālattil taārāpūṟuvam Āka taṉmacātaṉappaṭṭaiyam Āka kuṭutta miceṅkiḷi nāṭṭil
vaṅkāram Āṉa tevarāyaṉ Ēri muṉ Uṭaiyavar tirumalaiccāmantaṉār tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟi Aruḷiṉa
nilam Uṭpaṭṭa nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa nañcai puñcai nattam ceyta talaittipa māvaṭai maravaṭai
kuḷavaṭai Uḷpaṭa Intamutu koṇṭu nammuṭaiya canti Āka Oru canti tirumuṉ A(m)mutukkum makā
pūcai tiruppaṇikkum tirunāḷukkum kuṭuttapaṭiyāle cantiṟātittiyavaraiyum caṟuvamāṉṉiya
m Āka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷavum § Itil muṉ Uṭaiyavar tirumalaiccāmantaṉār
maṭappuṟamāka ttāmam ku maṭappuṟam Āka kuṭutta nilam (1/2)Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.744 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
